title: Create root layout, metadata, navigation, and footer shell
completion_summary: Root layout with navbar and footer shell created
acceptance_criteria: Root layout wraps children with semantic html and body, sets lang='tr' and metadata for Zer Müzik.
Navigation component is responsive: hamburger menu on mobile, inline links on md+.
Navbar links route to /, /store, /cart and include cart icon with badge.
Footer shell renders inside layout with brand name and placeholder links.
No content is hidden behind fixed navbar; main has sufficient top padding.
All interactive elements have cursor-pointer and visible focus states.
